title: Evil Jojo Modpack
description: Jojo Modpack that I made so I can play it
body:
Evil Jojo Modpack is a heavily customized Fabric 1.20.1 experience built around adventure, progression, exploration, and multiplayer gameplay.

Discover new structures, conquer dangerous dimensions, develop powerful abilities, build thriving settlements, sail the seas, and create your own story with friends.

Features

⚔️ RPG progression and skill systems

🌍 Expanded world generation and exploration

🏰 New structures, dungeons, and secrets

👥 Multiplayer-friendly gameplay

🚢 Ships and transportation

🧙 Powerful bosses and challenges

🏡 Village and civilization improvements

📜 Questing, progression, and long-term goals

⭐ JoJo-inspired content and gameplay

Recommended For
Multiplayer servers
Long-term survival worlds
RPG and progression fans
Exploration-focused players
Players looking for a challenging but rewarding experience
Server Support

This modpack is designed to work in both singleplayer and multiplayer environments.

Requirements
Minecraft 1.20.1
Fabric Loader
Java 17
Credits

All credit for individual mods belongs to their respective creators.
